title-group.article-title: Correction: Global mapping of sexually transmitted Chlamydia trachomatis disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis

contrib-group.aff: 1https://ror.org/034m2b326grid.411600.2Infectious Diseases and Tropical Medicine Research Center, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
2https://ror.org/01c4pz451grid.411705.60000 0001 0166 0922Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Tehran University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
3https://ror.org/03hh69c200000 0004 4651 6731Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Alborz University of Medical Sciences, Karaj, Iran
4Independent Microbiology Consultant, Jan van Goyenplein 31, 2231 MM, Rijnsburg, The Netherlands
5https://ror.org/034m2b326grid.411600.2School of Advanced Technologies in Medicine, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
6https://ror.org/034m2b326grid.411600.2Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
7https://ror.org/01c4pz451grid.411705.60000 0001 0166 0922Non-Communicable Diseases Research Center, Alborz University of Medical Sciences, Karaj, Iran

license.license-p: Open Access This article is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International License, which permits any non-commercial use, sharing, distribution and reproduction in any medium or format, as long as you give appropriate credit to the original author(s) and the source, provide a link to the Creative Commons licence, and indicate if you modified the licensed material. You do not have permission under this licence to share adapted material derived from this article or parts of it. The images or other third party material in this article are included in the article’s Creative Commons licence, unless indicated otherwise in a credit line to the material. If material is not included in the article’s Creative Commons licence and your intended use is not permitted by statutory regulation or exceeds the permitted use, you will need to obtain permission directly from the copyright holder. related-article.article-title: Global mapping of sexually transmitted Chlamydia trachomatis disease: a systematic review and meta-analysis

custom-meta.meta-value: © BioMed Central Ltd., part of Springer Nature 2026

body.p: In this article the affiliation details for Authors were incorrectly given as
Fatemeh Sameni1, 2, Tala Hajiarab3, Sara Bayat4, Mehrshad Ahmadi4, Alex van Belkum5, Ali Dadashi6, Mehdi Goudarzi7 and Masoud Dadashi4, 8*
1 Department of Microbiology, Faculty of Medicine, Shahed University, Tehran, Iran
2 Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Tehran University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
3 Independent Microbiology Consultant, Jan van Goyenplein 31, Rijnsburg 2231 MM, The Netherlands
4 Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Alborz University of Medical Sciences, Karaj, Iran
5 Molecular Microbiology Research Center, Shahed University, Tehran, Iran
6 School of Advanced Technologies in Medicine, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
7 Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
8 Non-Communicable Diseases Research Center, Alborz University of Medical Sciences, Karaj, Iran
but should have been
Fatemeh Sameni1, Tala Hajiarab2, Sara Bayat3, Mehrshad Ahmadi3, Alex van Belkum4 Ali Dadashi5, Mehdi Goudarzi6, Masoud Dadashi3, 7*
1 Infectious Diseases and Tropical Medicine Research Center, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
2 Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Tehran University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
3 Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Alborz University of Medical Sciences, Karaj, Iran
4 Independent Microbiology Consultant, Jan van Goyenplein 31, 2231 MM, Rijnsburg, The Netherlands
5 School of Advanced Technologies in Medicine, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
6 Department of Microbiology, School of Medicine, Shahid Beheshti University of Medical Sciences, Tehran, Iran
7 Non-Communicable Diseases Research Center, Alborz University of Medical Sciences, Karaj, Iran
The original article has been corrected.

fn.p: Springer Nature remains neutral with regard to jurisdictional claims in published maps and institutional affiliations.
